title: Myrcianthes mato
taxonomy: Myrcianthes mato is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It belongs to the genus Myrcianthes and is native to South America. The specific epithet 'mato' is likely derived from the local name for the plant. Myrcianthes mato is also known by other names, including Myrtus mato and Eugenia mato. Further classification and taxonomic information may require more specific research and data.
